notes:
First public alpha (re-baselined version number).
• Language switcher — run LitArbi in English/Deutsch/Français regardless of your macOS language (Settings ▸ General ▸ Language)
• Report a Bug / Request a Feature (Help menu) + an error log that rides along
• Sortable document list — click any column header (numeric-aware, unnumbered last)
• Resizable inspector + the search term is now highlighted in the PDF preview
• Convert citations to Plain Text (flatten fields for e-filing) and Sign (insert a signature block)
• Fixed the Word ribbon icons (custom icons instead of Microsoft's blank ones)
